title: VCL-total: Progressive Type Safety for Database Query Languages
description: Database query bugs form a total order by severity. VCL-total formalises this as progressive levels of type-level query safety, each strictly subsuming all prior levels. Levels 1-6 (established) cover parse-time to result-type safety. Levels 7-10 (research) cover aliasing, effects, lifetimes, and linearity via QTT. Formalised in Idris 2 with zero runtime overhead through proof erasure.
